ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cryptocurrencies" (
  "coin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cryptocurrency */,
  "coin_name" TEXT /* Name of the cryptocurrency */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the cryptocurrency (e.g., ETH, BTC) */,
  "price" REAL /* Current price of the cryptocurrency */,
  "change_24h" REAL /* Change in price over the past 24 hours */,
  "vol_24h" REAL /* Total trading volume over the past 24 hours */,
  "open_interest" REAL /* Total open interest */,
  "oi_change_24h" REAL /* Change in open interest over the past 24 hours */,
  "oi_share" REAL /* Open interest share */,
  "oi_vol24h" REAL /* Ratio of open interest to 24-hour trading volume */,
  "funding_avg" REAL /* Average funding rate */,
  "pred_funding_avg" REAL /* Predicted average funding rate */,
  "liqs_24h" REAL /* Total liquidations over the past 24 hours */,
  "market_cap" TEXT /* Total market capitalization of the cryptocurrency */,
  "circulating_supply" TEXT /* Number of coins in circulation */,
  "max_supply" TEXT /* Maximum number of coins that can ever be in circulation */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the coin's data */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the cryptocurrency */,
  "whitepaper" TEXT /* Link to the whitepaper of the cryptocurrency */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* Links to the cryptocurrency's social media profiles */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating or score given to the cryptocurrency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market data entry */,
  "coin_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cryptocurrency */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the market data */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the cryptocurrency at the given timestamp */,
  "change_24h" REAL /* Change in price over the past 24 hours */,
  "vol_24h" REAL /* Total trading volume over the past 24 hours */,
  "open_interest" REAL /* Total open interest */,
  "oi_change_24h" REAL /* Change in open interest over the past 24 hours */,
  "oi_share" REAL /* Open interest share */,
  "oi_vol24h" REAL /* Ratio of open interest to 24-hour trading volume */,
  "funding_avg" REAL /* Average funding rate */,
  "pred_funding_avg" REAL /* Predicted average funding rate */,
  "liqs_24h" REAL /* Total liquidations over the past 24 hours */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "data_quality_score" INTEGER /* Score indicating the quality of the data from the source */,
  "data_source_metadata" TEXT /* Additional metadata about the data source */,
  "volume_usd" REAL /* Trading volume in USD */,
  "volume_btc" REAL /* Trading volume in BTC */,
  "volume_eth" REAL /* Trading volume in ETH */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price in the given time period */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price in the given time period */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price at the start of the time period */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price at the end of the time period */,
  "trades_count" INTEGER /* Number of trades in the given time period */,
  "buy_volume" REAL /* Total buy volume in the given time period */,
  "sell_volume" REAL /* Total sell volume in the given time period */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_coin_id FOREIGN KEY ("coin_id") REFERENCES cryptocurrencies ("coin_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update from the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "permission_type" TEXT /* Type of permission (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
